interactions.description: Open the CDE registry from the Command Center CDE panel.

state.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center S Skyler Admin Workspace › local ⌘K UC connected · 95.5% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. GLOSSARY & CDE REGISTRY Shared business meaning, anchored to data Glossary terms link to source-of-record assets. Critical Data Elements have stricter ownership, certification, and lineage requirements. + New term Glossary 0 CDE Registry 49 Showing 5 of 49 CDE registry rows CDE SOURCE-OF-RECORD COLUMN OWNER RECERT STATUS Customer Identity Quality Source column unavailable customer-steward@entrada.ai 90d Source unavailable Compensation Band Source column unavailable people-steward@entrada.ai 90d Source unavailable Attribution Daily Source column unavailable marketing-steward@entrada.ai 90d Source unavailable Campaign Roi Revenue Source column unavailable marketing-steward@entrada.ai 90d Source unavailable Cfo Revenue Board Pack Source column unavailable finance-steward@entrada.ai 90d Source unavailable Status and recertification are registry metadata values. Quality test-run or recertification workflow proof appears only when backed evidence is returned. Atlas AI Grounded in available governance metadata - no raw rows read x Atlas AI recommendations require a configured Databricks Genie space. TRY ASKING ? Which CDEs are due for review? → ? What assets are linked to the selected glossary term? → ? Summarize reviewer status for critical CDEs. → ? Whic
